title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Activity has moderated this week as the Lunar New Year period temporarily slows market momentum. But despite seasonal slowdown, overall asset values continue to hold at firm levels across sectors, reflecting underlying confidence in earnings and sustained buying appetite. With several offer deadlines scheduled for next week, activity is expected to accelerate, and we will be able to report further as the market momentum builds.
